seoTitle: Macquarie vs Mawson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie and Mawson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie and Mawson.
heading: Macquarie vs Mawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie, Australian Capital Territory and Mawson, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie and Mawson have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Macquarie or Mawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Mawson scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Mawson scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie or Mawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
